conditions.name: Shoulder tendonitis
conditions.explanation: Inflammation causing sharp pain with shoulder movement.

conditions.name: Rotator cuff tear
conditions.explanation: Possible injury leading to pain and limited mobility.

data.action: Visit a pharmacy or GP within 1 to 2 days for evaluation.
home_tips: Rest the shoulder and avoid heavy lifting.
warning_signs: Persistent pain or sudden increase in severity.
data.disclaimer: This is AI information only, not medical advice. For emergencies call 115.
